campaign.title: Novel Deterministic Thermostat Samplers for the Canonical Ensemble
campaign.problem: Design and validate novel deterministic, continuous-time thermostat dynamics that sample the canonical (Boltzmann) distribution, with provable asymptotic correctness, clear thermostat interpretations, and diverse mixing/kinetic characteristics.
campaign.metric_description: KL divergence (primary, minimize); ESS per force eval (secondary, maximize); autocorrelation time (secondary, minimize); ergodicity score on 1D HO (pass threshold 0.85)

eval_methodology.summary: Fixed budget of 1M force evaluations. Stage 1: 2D double-well + 1D harmonic oscillator (gate). Stage 2: 5-mode GMM + Rosenbrock (moderate). Stage 3: Lennard-Jones clusters (full validation). KL via histogram binning (low-D) or k-NN estimator. Ergodicity score = geometric mean of KS-statistic component, variance-match component, and phase-space coverage on 20x20 grid.

campaign.direction: minimize KL divergence, minimize autocorrelation, maximize ESS/force-eval

timeline.author: wwang2
timeline.body: Debate: Problem Statement Review. Consensus: SUPPORT (2/3). Agent 3's concern resolved by tiered analytical verification.

timeline.author: wwang2
timeline.body: orbit/log-osc-001 complete: KL=0.010 (DW), ergodicity=0.944 (HO). Single thermostat variable with bounded friction breaks KAM tori more effectively than 3-chain NHC.

timeline.author: wwang2
timeline.body: orbit/dual-bath-001 complete: KL=0.002 (HO), ergodicity=0.927, DW KL=0.030. NHC(2)+rotation beats NHC(M=3) on 3/4 metrics.

timeline.author: wwang2
timeline.body: orbit/esh-thermo-001 complete: Ergodicity=0.949. SinhDrive-NHC. Caveat: O(beta^2) bias, not Tier 1 compliant.

timeline.author: wwang2
timeline.body: Round 2 Results: log-osc-stage2-003 GMM KL=0.377; general-nonlinear-004 tested 11 friction functions, log-osc is the best.

timeline.body: NEW WINNER: orbit/log-osc-multiT-005. Multi-Scale Log-Osc at Qs=[0.1, 0.7, 10.0]. GMM KL = 0.148 -- 2.6x improvement.

timeline.author: wwang2

timeline.body: NEW CHAMPION: orbit/multiscale-chain-009. Multi-Scale NHC-Tail dominates ALL benchmarks. GMM KL=0.054, HO Erg=0.932, DW KL=0.008.

issue_comments.body: P3 NOT CONFIRMED: alpha=1 (1/f) NOT the minimizer of effective tau. alpha=1.5 has lower raw tau. All runs non-ergodic at N=1.
